title: Gary Justice
compiled_truth: Gary Justice is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (2000-09-15 to 2001-11-26), Gary Justice sent 13 and received 239 emails, totalling 252 interactions. Top correspondents: [Louise Kitchen](people/louise-kitchen) (13), [Tammie Schoppe](people/tammie-schoppe) (11), [William Abler](people/william-abler) (11), [Karla Compean](people/karla-compean) (11), [Wendy Conwell](people/wendy-conwell) (11).
